exemplar.title: What is the relationship between personal experience and knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: What is the relationship between personal experience and knowledge?

strengths: Three distinct objects are clearly identified with specific real-world contexts, aiding reader orientation.
Links between each object and the IA prompt are coherent, showing how personal practice interacts with shared knowledge.
Several insightful examples (e.g., sensory contrast in the weather app, Aristotleâs maxim for experiential learning) deepen the analysis.
Effective use of quotations and references (such as the Feynman quote and reflection on confirmation bias) to support arguments.
weaknesses: Explanations occasionally lack precision and drift into generic discussion instead of tying tightly to each object.
Repetition in the weather-app section reduces analytical depth and weakens focus.
Citation style and formatting are inconsistent, disrupting the narrative flow and academic presentation.
Justification for the mnemonic device is underdeveloped and needs stronger evidence of its contribution to the prompt.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: A score of 6 reflects the studentâs solid achievement in the 5â6 band: three well-chosen objects with real-world contexts, generally coherent links to the IA prompt, and targeted evidence that supports most points. However, occasional vagueness, repetition, and inconsistent formatting prevent the work from reaching the clarity and consistently strong justification required for higher bands (7â8). This mid-band mark acknowledges both the clear strengths in organization and insight and the areas needing greater precision and analytical depth.

annotations.comment: The label clearly identifies the second object and hints at its function, priming the reader for the analysis.
The prompt is clearly stated, but consider integrating it into the narrative body to ensure seamless flow rather than isolating it in the table.
The student clearly labels Object 1 and ties it to a familiar context, aiding reader orientation.
Consider adding a brief introduction summarizing the exhibitionâs thesis to guide the reader before Object 1.
High-resolution image of the basketball engages the reader visually, but it lacks a caption linking the image explicitly to TOK concepts.
The student uses Aristotleâs maxim to anchor experiential learning, reinforcing the connection between personal practice and knowledge.
The opening âTo improve.â is a sentence fragment that disrupts flow; consider combining it with the following clause for clarity and coherence.
The in-text citation format is inconsistent; specify page numbers or use a uniform style to distinguish sourced ideas from reflections.
The distinction between personal and shared knowledge, illustrated via coaching perspectives, effectively demonstrates how external bodies of knowledge inform personal skill development.
Cite a TOK thinker (e.g., Kuhn or Popper) when discussing multiplicity of perspectives, to bolster the theoretical grounding of this claim.
Consider explicitly linking this discussion to the IA prompt about personal experience and knowledge to maintain focus on the core question.
The concluding statement concisely summarizes how encountering conflicting perspectives can deepen personal knowledge, reinforcing the exhibitionâs thesis.
The in-text citation appears within a math tag and disrupts reading; format it consistently within parentheses in the narrative.
Good description of how the weather app aggregates disparate data sources, illustrating the interplay of personal observation with shared scientific knowledge.
The vivid sensory example (cloudy sky) effectively contrasts subjective interpretation with empirical data, clarifying the relationship between personal experience and knowledge.
The paragraph reiterates the appâs validation role twice; streamline the discussion to focus on deeper analysis of the implications for knowledge production.
To strengthen the point about forecasting errors, include specific examples or statistics on prediction accuracy rates to substantiate the argument.
Highlighting user-contributed data emphasizes the dynamic interaction between personal observations and collective scientific knowledge.
The concluding statement could more directly reference the IA prompt to reaffirm the thematic connection between personal experience and knowledge.
Instead of âCommentary 3,â use âObject 3: Mnemonic Deviceâ to maintain parallel structure across object sections.
The handwritten note lacks clarity in digital format; retype or annotate directly in the text to ensure legibility and consistency.
The explanation of how the mnemonic fosters emotional connection is insightful, linking affective dimensions to memory formation.
The Feynman quote is effectively used, but the citation style should be consistent (e.g., include publication details).
Provide evidence or example of a specific test question where mnemonic application improved understanding to substantiate this claim.
The reflection on overconfidence during test use of the mnemonic addresses confirmation bias well, deepening the analysis.
The phrase âpolar oppositeâ is awkward; revise for clarity (e.g., âcould impair understandingâ).
Consider linking this discussion explicitly back to the IA prompt to remind readers of the overarching theme.
The references lack uniform formatting (e.g., missing italics for website titles); apply a consistent citation style across all entries.
Have you considered adding DOIs or stable URLs for ease of verification of your online sources?
The TOK-related source should include author or organization and access date to meet academic conventions.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
